notSupported.title: WebSerial Not Supported
notSupported.description: Please use Chrome, Edge, or Opera to configure your drum.

headerConnectionStatus.firefoxExtensionRequired: Firefox requires an extension for WebSerial
headerConnectionStatus.firefoxExtensionLink: To configure your drum with Firefox, please install the WebSerial extension

howItWorks.heading: How it works:
howItWorks.step1: The update file will be downloaded.
howItWorks.step2: Your device will reboot into bootloader mode.
howItWorks.step3: A "Save File" dialog will appear. Save the file to the "RPI-RP2" drive.

backup.label: Backup configuration before updating
backup.hint: May take a few seconds if a PS4 auth key is stored.

progress.waitingForDevice: Waiting for device to reboot into bootloader mode...
progress.flashingPrompt: Please save the file to the "RPI-RP2" drive.
progress.writingWarning: Copying firmware to device. Do not unplug!

manualAction.intro: The firmware file has been downloaded to your computer.
manualAction.step2: Drag and drop the file onto the "RPI-RP2" drive.
manualAction.step3: The device will automatically reboot when finished.

complete.heading: Update Complete!
complete.description: Your device has been updated and is rebooting.

description.idle: Complete wipe and reflash of your controller.

warning.title: Warning: This will wipe your device!
warning.description: This emergency recovery process will completely erase all data on your controller, including settings and calibration. Only use this if your device is bricked or a normal firmware update failed.

deviceNotConnected.instructions: Make sure your device is already in bootloader mode (RPI-RP2 drive should be visible) before proceeding.
deviceNotConnected.bootselHint: Hold 1 then hold 2. Once the controller disconnects, release 1 then 2. A RPI-RP2 drive should appear on your computer.

recoveryProcess.heading: Recovery process:
recoveryProcess.stepReboot: Device will reboot into bootloader mode
recoveryProcess.stepNuke: You'll save a "flash nuke" file to wipe the device
recoveryProcess.stepRebootAfterWipe: Device will reboot again after wipe
recoveryProcess.stepFirmware: You'll save the latest firmware to restore functionality

readyToNuke.title: Step 1: Save the flash nuke file to the RPI-RP2 drive
readyToNuke.description: This will completely wipe the device. Make sure to save it to the correct drive!

confirmNuke.intro: The flash_nuke.uf2 file has been downloaded to your computer.
confirmNuke.step2: Drag and drop it onto the "RPI-RP2" drive.
confirmNuke.step3: The device will disconnect and reboot immediately.
confirmNuke.clickContinue: Click Continue after dragging the file.

waitingAfterNuke.wiping: Waiting for device to wipe and reboot...
waitingAfterNuke.downloading: Downloading latest firmware in the background...

readyToFlash.title: Step 2: Save the firmware file to the RPI-RP2 drive
readyToFlash.description: The device has been wiped. Now save the firmware to restore it.

confirmFlash.intro: The firmware file has been downloaded to your computer.
confirmFlash.step2: Drag and drop it onto the "RPI-RP2" drive.
confirmFlash.step3: The device will reboot into application mode.
confirmFlash.clickDone: Click Done after dragging the file.

complete.heading: Recovery Complete!
complete.description: Your device has been wiped and reflashed. Please reconnect to your device manually.

error.title: Recovery Failed
error.tryAgainHint: You can try again or manually download the files from the GitHub releases page.
